title: Brass and Runes
description: A mod pack with the intention of not only providing quality of life improvements such as apple skin while also improving game performance. On top of that, the mod pack focuses on an experience that is Fantasy/Steampunk, adding animals and Create.
body: A mod pack with quality of life improvements to make gameplay easier as well as providing a smoother experience with performance mods for both server and client experiences. On top of that, mods included provide gameplay centered around a Fantasy/Steampunk vibe, with new animals and technology that’s not extremely advanced but also not overwhelming, allowing automation with a DND-esque feel. Note that, while improving performance, there are also mods that give provide a better graphical experience, allowing for a smoother game with better appearance. It is not a light pack, however, and will affect performance with heavy mods like Create and Terralith, so performance will vary.
